candidate_check.description: The Cisco switch must be configured to have Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) unreachable messages disabled on all external interfaces.

check_content_excerpt:
Review the switch configuration to determine if it is compliant with this requirement. The ip unreachables command must not be found on any interface as shown in the example below:

interface Ethernet2/7
 no switchport
 ip address x.22.4.2/30
 ip unreachables

If ICMP unreachable notifications are sent from any external interfaces, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Disable ip unreachables on all external interfaces as shown below:

SW1(config)# int e2/7
SW1(config-if)# no ip unreachables
SW1(config-if)# end
title: The Cisco switch must be configured to have Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) unreachable messages disabled on all external interfaces.
